prayer.es:
Oh dulcÃ­simo JesÃºs, cuyo desbordante amor por los hombres es todavÃ­a tan incomprensiblemente ignorado, ven a mis labios esta sencilla oraciÃ³n de consagraciÃ³n y reparaciÃ³n.

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, humildemente postrado ante Ti, vengo a hacerte reparaciÃ³n de todas las indiferencias e injurias con que los hombres ofenden a Tu amante CorazÃ³n. Contrito de mis propias culpas y principalmente movido de gran amor hacia Ti, propongo firmemente nunca mÃ¡s ofenderte.

Te ofrezco, juntamente con mis pobres satisfacciones, las que Te ofreciÃ³ la Virgen SantÃ­sima MarÃ­a y todos los Santos y Justos; prometiÃ©ndote sinceramente que, con Tu ayuda y gracia, procurarÃ© en lo futuro dar buen ejemplo de cristiano y hacer todo lo posible por la salvaciÃ³n de las almas. AmÃ©n.
prayer.en:
O most sweet Jesus, Whose overflowing charity for men is so little known and appreciated, come before us in this simple prayer of consecration and reparation.

Sacred Heart of Jesus, humbly prostrate before You, I come to make reparation for all the coldness and neglect with which men repay Your loving Heart. Contrite for my own sins and moved by great love for You, I firmly resolve never to offend You again.

I offer You, together with my poor acts of reparation, those which the most holy Virgin Mary and all the Saints and Just have offered You; sincerely promising that, with Your help and grace, I will in future strive to give a good Christian example and do all that lies in my power for the salvation of souls. Amen.

history.es:
El Sagrado Corazon de Jesus es la fuente de fuego del amor divino, revelado a una humilde monja francesa en el siglo XVII y prometido como refugio eterno para la humanidad.

1. LAS APARICIONES EN PARAY-LE-MONIAL Y LAS DOCE PROMESAS (1673-1675)
En el convento de la Visitacion de Paray-le-Monial, Francia, Jesus se aparecio a Santa Margarita Maria Alacoque doce veces, mostrando Su Corazon coronado de espinas, en llamas, con una cruz de oro. Le confio las Doce Promesas: paz en los hogares, consuelo en la tribulacion, fervor en los tibios, conversion de los pecadores, y la gracia de la perseverancia final para quienes comulgaran nueve Primeros Viernes consecutivos. Margarita Maria quedaba postrada horas enteras despues de cada vision, incapaz de moverse, inundada de un gozo que superaba todo entendimiento humano.

2. LA GRAN PROMESA DE LOS NUEVE PRIMEROS VIERNES
«A los que reciban la Sagrada Comunion nueve primeros viernes consecutivos, Mi Divino Corazon les concedera la gracia de la perseverancia final: no moriran bajo Mi desagrado ni sin haber recibido sus Sacramentos.» Esta promesa fue probada en campos de batalla donde soldados morian en paz inesperada, en camas de hospital donde ateos reconciliados recibieron los ultimos sacramentos, y en familias enteras transformadas por esta sencilla practica de amor. Los testimonios se cuentan por millones en dos siglos.

3. LA BASILICA DEL SAGRADO CORAZON EN MONTMARTRE Y LA REPARACION NACIONAL
Tras la humillacion de Francia en la guerra franco-prusiana de 1870, los obispos franceses recordaron que Luis XIV habia ignorado el pedido de Cristo de consagrar la nacion al Sagrado Corazon. En acto de reparacion, el pueblo levanto la Basilica del Sagrado Corazon sobre la colina de Montmartre —«el monte de los martires»— en Paris. Desde su consagracion en 1919, la adoracion perpetua no se ha interrumpido ni un solo dia, y centenares de curaciones certificadas han sido atribuidas a la intercesion del Sagrado Corazon en sus capillas.
history.en:
The Sacred Heart of Jesus is the furnace of divine love, revealed to a humble French nun in the seventeenth century and promised as an eternal refuge for all humanity.

1. THE APPARITIONS AT PARAY-LE-MONIAL AND THE TWELVE PROMISES (1673-1675)
In the Visitation convent of Paray-le-Monial, France, Jesus appeared to Saint Margaret Mary Alacoque twelve times, showing His Heart crowned with thorns, aflame, surmounted by a golden cross. He entrusted her with the Twelve Promises: peace in homes, consolation in trials, fervor in the lukewarm, conversion of sinners, and the grace of final perseverance for those who would receive Communion on nine consecutive First Fridays. Margaret Mary lay prostrate for hours after each vision, unable to move, flooded with a joy that surpassed all human understanding.

2. THE GREAT PROMISE OF THE NINE FIRST FRIDAYS
"To those who receive Holy Communion on nine consecutive First Fridays, My Divine Heart will grant the grace of final perseverance: they will not die under My displeasure nor without having received their Sacraments." This promise was confirmed on battlefields where soldiers died in unexpected peace, in hospital beds where reconciled skeptics received the Last Rites, and in entire families transformed by this simple act of love. The testimonies number in the millions over two centuries.

3. THE BASILICA OF SACRE-COEUR IN MONTMARTRE AND THE NATIONAL REPARATION
After France's humiliation in the Franco-Prussian War of 1870, the French bishops recalled that Louis XIV had ignored Christ's request to consecrate the nation to the Sacred Heart. In an act of reparation, the people raised the Basilica of Sacre-Coeur atop the hill of Montmartre — "the mount of martyrs" — in Paris. Since its consecration in 1919, perpetual adoration has not been interrupted a single day, and hundreds of certified healings have been attributed to the intercession of the Sacred Heart in its chapels.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 1 â€” El Amor del Sagrado CorazÃ³n

Amado JesÃºs, fuente de todo amor, hoy medito en Tu Sagrado CorazÃ³n que arde con amor infinito por cada uno de nosotros. AyÃºdame a comprender, aunque sea una pequeÃ±a fracciÃ³n, de la profundidad de Tu amor.

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, infunde en mÃ­ ese mismo amor con el que TÃº amas al Padre y a cada alma humana. AmÃ©n.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 1 â€” The Love of the Sacred Heart

Dear Jesus, source of all love, today I meditate on Your Sacred Heart that burns with infinite love for each one of us. Help me to understand, even if only a tiny fraction, of the depth of Your love.

Sacred Heart of Jesus, pour into me that same love with which You love the Father and every human soul. Amen.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 2 â€” La ReparaciÃ³n

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, me duele saber que Tu amor es tan frecuentemente ignorado y rechazado. Hoy quiero hacer reparaciÃ³n por todas las ofensas cometidas contra Ti. Acepta mi amor como pequeÃ±o consuelo de Tu CorazÃ³n herido.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 2 â€” Reparation

Sacred Heart of Jesus, it pains me to know that Your love is so often ignored and rejected. Today I wish to make reparation for all the offenses committed against You. Accept my love as a small consolation for Your wounded Heart.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 3 â€” La Humildad

JesÃºs manso y humilde de CorazÃ³n, ensÃ©Ã±ame Tu humildad. Que aprenda de Ti a no buscar honores sino a servir, a no buscar poder sino a amar. Que mi corazÃ³n cada dÃ­a se parezca mÃ¡s al Tuyo.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 3 â€” Humility

Jesus, meek and humble of Heart, teach me Your humility. May I learn from You not to seek honors but to serve, not to seek power but to love. May my heart each day become more like Yours.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 4 â€” La EucaristÃ­a

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, que nos das Tu Cuerpo y Sangre en la EucaristÃ­a, aumenta mi devociÃ³n al SantÃ­simo Sacramento. Que cada vez que Te reciba en la ComuniÃ³n, mi corazÃ³n se encienda mÃ¡s en Tu amor.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 4 â€” The Eucharist

Sacred Heart of Jesus, who give us Your Body and Blood in the Eucharist, increase my devotion to the Most Blessed Sacrament. May each time I receive You in Communion, my heart be set more ablaze with Your love.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 5 â€” El PerdÃ³n

JesÃºs misericordioso, que perdonaste a tus verdugos desde la Cruz, enseÃ±ame a perdonar a quienes me han herido. Que el amor de Tu Sagrado CorazÃ³n ablande mi corazÃ³n y lo libere del resentimiento.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 5 â€” Forgiveness

Merciful Jesus, who forgave Your executioners from the Cross, teach me to forgive those who have hurt me. May the love of Your Sacred Heart soften my heart and free it from resentment.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 6 â€” Las Familias

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, que santificaste el hogar de Nazaret, santifica tambiÃ©n los hogares de nuestras familias. Que Tu amor reine en cada familia, trayendo paz, unidad y santidad.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 6 â€” Families

Sacred Heart of Jesus, who sanctified the home of Nazareth, sanctify also the homes of our families. May Your love reign in every family, bringing peace, unity, and holiness.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 7 â€” Los Sacerdotes

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, sumo y eterno Sacerdote, protege y santifica a todos los sacerdotes. Que su corazÃ³n se encienda en amor hacia Ti y que sean autÃ©nticos pastores de almas segÃºn Tu CorazÃ³n.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 7 â€” Priests

Sacred Heart of Jesus, supreme and eternal Priest, protect and sanctify all priests. May their hearts be set ablaze with love for You and may they be true shepherds of souls according to Your Heart.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 8 â€” Los Enfermos y Moribundos

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, que sanaste a los enfermos y consolaste a los que sufrÃ­an, ten piedad de los enfermos y moribundos. Que en su hora mÃ¡s difÃ­cil sientan el calor de Tu amor y la cercanÃ­a de Tu presencia.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 8 â€” The Sick and Dying

Sacred Heart of Jesus, who healed the sick and consoled those who suffered, have mercy on the sick and dying. May in their most difficult hour they feel the warmth of Your love and the nearness of Your presence.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

novena.es:
DÃ­a 9 â€” La ConsagraciÃ³n

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, en este Ãºltimo dÃ­a me consagro a Ti. Me doy enteramente: mi corazÃ³n, mi mente, mi voluntad y todo mi ser. Que ya no viva yo, sino que sea TÃº quien vivas en mÃ­.

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, confÃ­o en Ti.

Reza: 1 Padre Nuestro, 1 Ave MarÃ­a, 1 Gloria.
novena.en:
Day 9 â€” Consecration

Sacred Heart of Jesus, on this last day I consecrate myself to You. I give myself entirely: my heart, my mind, my will, and my whole being. May it no longer be I who live, but You who live in me.

Sacred Heart of Jesus, I trust in You.

Pray: 1 Our Father, 1 Hail Mary, 1 Glory Be.

chaplet.es:
Coronilla del Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs

Se reza usando un rosario o una sencilla corona de 33 cuentas (en honor a los 33 aÃ±os de la vida de JesÃºs).

Comienza:
Â«Venid, adoremos y postrÃ©monos ante Dios; lloremos ante el SeÃ±or que nos creÃ³.Â»

En las cuentas grandes (6 veces):
Â«Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, en Ti confÃ­o.Â»

En las cuentas pequeÃ±as (10 veces cada decena):
Â«JesÃºs manso y humilde de CorazÃ³n, haz mi corazÃ³n semejante al Tuyo.Â»

Finaliza:
Â«Oh dulcÃ­simo CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, haz que Te ame cada vez mÃ¡s.Â» (3 veces)

Â«Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, que TÃº reines.Â»
chaplet.en:
Chaplet of the Sacred Heart of Jesus

Prayed using a rosary or a simple crown of 33 beads (in honor of the 33 years of Jesus's life).

Begin:
'Come, let us worship and bow down; let us kneel before the Lord our Maker.'

On the large beads (6 times):
'Sacred Heart of Jesus, I trust in You.'

On the small beads (10 times each decade):
'Jesus, meek and humble of Heart, make my heart like unto Yours.'

Conclude:
'O most sweet Heart of Jesus, grant that I may ever love You more and more.' (3 times)

'Sacred Heart of Jesus, may You reign.'

litany.es:
LetanÃ­as del Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs

SeÃ±or, ten piedad. SeÃ±or, ten piedad.
Cristo, ten piedad. Cristo, ten piedad.
SeÃ±or, ten piedad. SeÃ±or, ten piedad.

Dios Padre celestial, ten misericordia de nosotros.
Dios Hijo Redentor del mundo, ten misericordia de nosotros.
Dios EspÃ­ritu Santo, ten misericordia de nosotros.
SantÃ­sima Trinidad, un solo Dios, ten misericordia de nosotros.

CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, Hijo del eterno Padre, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, formado en el seno virginal por el EspÃ­ritu Santo, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, de infinita majestad, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, templo santo de Dios, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, tabernÃ¡culo del AltÃ­simo, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, casa de Dios y puerta del cielo, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, horno ardiente de caridad, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, morada de la justicia y del amor, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, lleno de bondad y de amor, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, abismo de todas las virtudes, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, Rey y centro de todos los corazones, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, en quien estÃ¡n los tesoros de sabidurÃ­a y ciencia, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, en quien habita toda la plenitud de la divinidad, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, en quien se complace el Padre eterno, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, de cuya plenitud todos hemos recibido, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, paciente y misericordioso, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, generoso para todos los que te invocan, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, fuente de vida y de santidad, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, propiciaciÃ³n por nuestros pecados, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, triturado por nuestras culpas, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, obediente hasta la muerte, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, traspasado con una lanza, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, fuente de todo consuelo, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, vida y resurrecciÃ³n nuestra, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, paz y reconciliaciÃ³n nuestra, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, salvaciÃ³n de los que en Ti esperan, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, esperanza de los que en Ti mueren, ten piedad de nosotros.
CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, delicia de todos los santos, ten piedad de nosotros.

Cordero de Dios, que quitas el pecado del mundo, perdÃ³nanos, SeÃ±or.
Cordero de Dios, que quitas el pecado del mundo, escÃºchanos, SeÃ±or.
Cordero de Dios, que quitas el pecado del mundo, ten piedad de nosotros.

V. JesÃºs, manso y humilde de corazÃ³n.
R. Haz nuestro corazÃ³n semejante al tuyo.

Oremos: Dios omnipotente y eterno, que quisiste que tu Hijo fuese traspasado con una lanza y que su CorazÃ³n abierto se convirtiera en santuario de misericordia: concede que, venerando el Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, hallemos en Ã‰l perdÃ³n y amor. Por el mismo Jesucristo, SeÃ±or nuestro. AmÃ©n.
litany.en:
Litany of the Sacred Heart of Jesus

Lord, have mercy. Lord, have mercy.
Christ, have mercy. Christ, have mercy.
Lord, have mercy. Lord, have mercy.

God the Father in heaven, have mercy on us.
God the Son, Redeemer of the world, have mercy on us.
God the Holy Spirit, have mercy on us.
Holy Trinity, one God, have mercy on us.

Heart of Jesus, Son of the eternal Father, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, formed in the womb of a Virgin Mother by the Holy Spirit, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, of infinite majesty, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, holy temple of God, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, tabernacle of the Most High, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, house of God and gate of heaven, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, burning furnace of charity, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, vessel of justice and love, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, full of goodness and love, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, abyss of all virtues, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, King and center of all hearts, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, in whom are all the treasures of wisdom and knowledge, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, in whom dwells all the fullness of the Godhead, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, in whom the Father is well pleased, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, of whose fullness we have all received, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, patient and full of mercy, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, generous to all who call upon You, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, fountain of life and holiness, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, propitiation for our sins, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, crushed for our offenses, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, obedient unto death, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, pierced with a lance, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, source of all consolation, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, our life and resurrection, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, our peace and reconciliation, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, salvation of those who hope in You, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, hope of those who die in You, have mercy on us.
Heart of Jesus, delight of all the saints, have mercy on us.

Lamb of God, who takes away the sins of the world, spare us, O Lord.
Lamb of God, who takes away the sins of the world, graciously hear us, O Lord.
Lamb of God, who takes away the sins of the world, have mercy on us.

V. Jesus, meek and humble of heart.
R. Make our hearts like unto Thine.

Let us pray: Almighty and eternal God, look upon the Heart of Your beloved Son and upon the praises and satisfaction which He offers You on behalf of sinners; and grant pardon to those who seek Your mercy, in the name of Your Son Jesus Christ. Amen.

consecration.es:
Acto de ConsagraciÃ³n al Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs

Oh Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, a Ti me consagro hoy y para siempre con todo mi ser: inteligencia, voluntad, sentimientos y acciones. Que todo en mÃ­ estÃ© orientado hacia Ti y que ningÃºn pecado separe de Ti mi corazÃ³n.

Me consagro tambiÃ©n a Ti en nombre de todos los que me rodean, de mi familia y de cuantos no te conocen todavÃ­a. Reina en nosotros, Sagrado CorazÃ³n, como reinaste en el hogar de Nazaret.

Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, en Ti confÃ­o. Sagrado CorazÃ³n de JesÃºs, haz que Te ame cada vez mÃ¡s.

AmÃ©n.
consecration.en:
Act of Consecration to the Sacred Heart of Jesus

O Sacred Heart of Jesus, I consecrate myself to You today and forever with my whole being: mind, will, feelings and actions. May everything in me be directed toward You, and may no sin ever separate my heart from Yours.

I also consecrate to You all those around me, my family and all who do not yet know You. Reign over us, Sacred Heart, as You reigned in the home of Nazareth.

Sacred Heart of Jesus, in You I trust. Sacred Heart of Jesus, may I love You more and more.

Amen.
